name: Proactive and Growth Oriented
description: A tendency to proactively pursue excellence through setting high standards, engaging in continuous learning, and persisting and adapting in the face of challenges and uncertainty at work.

name: Innovation
description: A tendency to be inventive, to be imaginative, and to adopt new perspectives on ways to accomplish work.

name: Achievement Orientation
description: A tendency to establish and maintain personally challenging work-related goals, set high work-related standards, and exert high effort toward meeting those goals and standards.

name: Intellectual Curiosity
description: A tendency to seek out and acquire new work-related knowledge and obtain a deep understanding of work-related subjects.

name: Tolerance for Ambiguity
description: A tendency to be comfortable with ambiguity and uncertainty at work.

name: Initiative
description: A tendency to be proactive and take on extra responsibilities and tasks that may fall outside of one's required work role.

name: Adaptability
description: A tendency to be open to and comfortable with change, new experiences, or ideas at work.

name: Self-Confidence
description: A tendency to believe in one's work-related capabilities and ability to control one's work-related outcomes.

name: Perseverance
description: A tendency to exhibit determination and resolve to perform or complete tasks in the face of difficult circumstances or obstacles at work.

name: Leadership Orientation
description: A tendency to lead, take charge, offer opinions, and provide direction at work.

name: Interpersonally Oriented
description: A tendency to engage with others in a positive, supportive, selfless, and considerate manner at work.

name: Humility
description: A tendency to be modest and humble when interacting with others at work.

name: Sincerity
description: A tendency to be genuine and sincere in interactions with others at work, without concern for personal gain or self-interest.

name: Empathy
description: A tendency to show concern for others and be sensitive to others' needs and feelings at work.

name: Cooperation
description: A tendency to be pleasant, helpful, and willing to assist others at work.

name: Optimism
description: A tendency to exhibit a positive attitude and positive emotions at work, even under difficult circumstances.

name: Social Orientation
description: A tendency to seek out, enjoy, and be energized by social interaction at work.

name: Conscientious and Rule Oriented
description: A tendency to approach work with careful attention to quality, reliability, and ethical standards while maintaining organized and thorough work practices.

name: Cautiousness
description: A tendency to be careful, deliberate, and risk-avoidant when making work-related decisions or doing work.

name: Attention to Detail
description: A tendency to be detail-oriented, organized, and thorough in completing work.

name: Dependability
description: A tendency to be reliable, responsible, and consistent in meeting work-related obligations.

name: Integrity
description: A tendency to be honest and ethical at work.

name: Emotionally Resilient
description: A tendency to maintain emotional stability and cope effectively in the face of adversity, criticism, or high-pressure situations at work.

name: Stress Tolerance
description: A tendency to cope and function effectively in stressful situations at work.

name: Self-Control
description: A tendency to remain calm and composed and to manage emotions effectively in response to criticism or difficult situations at work.
